top3.sql:
SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY total_goals ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY total_goals ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) ASC
LIMIT 5;

WITH league_goals AS (
    SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
    FROM League l
    JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
    GROUP BY l.id, l.name
)
SELECT name, total_goals
FROM league_goals
ORDER BY total_goals ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY l.id) DESC
LIMIT 5;

final.sql:
SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) ASC
LIMIT 5;
